title: Change of His Majesty’s Ambassador to Latvia: Kathy Leach
body: "Curriculum vitae             Full name: Kathy Leach     Date Role     2021 to present Astana, His Majesty’s Ambassador   2019 to 2020 FCDO, Deputy Director, Constitution and Devolution, Europe Directorate   2015 to 2018 FCO, Head then Deputy Director, Policy Unit, Strategy Directorate   2012 to 2015 Yerevan, Her Majesty’s  Ambassador   2007 to 2011 Tokyo, Head, Energy and Environment Team   2005 FCO, Deputy Head, Passport and Documentary Services, Consular   2001 to 2004 Moscow, First Secretary Security Policy, then Internal Political   2000 to 2001 FCO, Desk Officer, EU Trade and Development Policy, Europe Directorate   2000 Joined FCO      Media enquiries     Email newsdesk@fcdo.gov.uk     Telephone 020 7008 3100    Email the FCDO Newsdesk (monitored 24 hours a day) in the first instance, and we will respond as soon as possible.   "
